editableFrameAttributes: Attributes for the editable frame[.sun-editor-editable]. (e.g. [key]: value)
editorStyle: Style string of the top frame of the editor. (e.g. "border: 1px solid #ccc;").
iframe: Content will be placed in an iframe and isolated from the rest of the page.
iframe_fullPage: Allows the usage of HTML, HEAD, BODY tags and DOCTYPE declaration on the "iframe".
statusbar_showPathLabel: Displays the current node structure to status bar.
statusbar_resizeEnable: Enables resize function of bottom status bar
charCounter: Shows the number of characters in the editor. - If the maxCharCount option has a value, it becomes true.
charCounter_max: The maximum number of characters allowed to be inserted into the editor.
charCounter_label: Text to be displayed in the "charCounter" area of the bottom bar. (e.g. "Characters : 20/200")
charCounter_type: Defines the calculation method of the "charCounter" option. - 'char': Characters length. - 'byte': Binary data size of characters. - 'byte-html': Binary data size of the full HTML string.
top: Styles applied to the top container (e.g. width, z-index, etc).
frame: Styles applied to the iframe container (e.g. height, min-height).
editor: Styles applied to the editable content area.
codeMirror5Editor: CodeMirror5 editor instance (frame-level). Set by `_checkCodeMirror` after initialization.
codeMirror6Editor: CodeMirror6 EditorView instance (frame-level). Set by `_checkCodeMirror` after initialization.
buttonList: List of toolbar buttons, grouped by sub-arrays. - The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.BUTTON_LIST}
v2Migration: Enables migration mode for SunEditor v2.
strictMode: Enables strict filtering of tags, attributes, and styles. - Use `true` to enable all filters (default), or an object to control individual filters. - Setting `false` is not supported; use the object form to disable specific filters instead. @property {Array<string>} [scopeSelectionTags=CONSTANTS.SCOPE_SELECTION_TAGS] - Tags treated as whole units when selecting all content. - The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.SCOPE_SELECTION_TAGS} ///  === Content Filtering & Formatting === == #### 1) Tag & Element Control @property {string} [elementWhitelist=""] - Specifies HTML elements to additionally allow beyond the 'default' allow list. Delimiter: "|" (e.g. "p|div", "*"). - The value entered here will be added to the end of the default list determined by the {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__defaultElementWhitelist} logic above. @property {string} [elementBlacklist=""] - Filters by specifying HTML elements that should not be used. Delimiter: "|" (e.g. "script|style"). - Tags specified here will eventually be removed, even if they are included in other whitelists. @property {string} [allowedEmptyTags=CONSTANTS.ALLOWED_EMPTY_NODE_LIST] - A list of tags that are allowed to be kept even if their values are empty. - The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.ALLOWED_EMPTY_NODE_LIST} - It is concatenated with the value of "ALLOWED_EMPTY_NODE_LIST" to form the final 'allowedEmptyTags' list. @property {string} [allowedClassName=""] - Allowed class names. - Added the default value {@link DEFAULTS.CLASS_NAME} ///  #### 2) Attribute Control @property {{[key: string]: string|undefined}} [attributeWhitelist=null] - Specifies additional attributes to allow for each tag. (e.g. {a: "href|target", img: "src|alt", "*": "id"}). - Rules for objects specified here will be merged into the {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__defaultAttributeWhitelist}. @property {{[key: string]: string|undefined}} [attributeBlacklist=null] - Filter by specifying attributes to disallow by tag. (e.g. {a: "href|target", img: "src|alt", "*": "name"}). - Attributes specified here will eventually be removed even if they are allowed by other settings. - A list of required elements, {@link DEFAULTS.REQUIRED_FORMAT_LINE}, is always included. ///  #### 3) Text & Inline Style Control @property {string} [textStyleTags=__textStyleTags] - Additional text style tags. - The default follows {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__textStyleTags} @property {Object<string, string>} [convertTextTags={bold: "strong", underline: "u", italic: "em", strike: "del", subscript: "sub", superscript: "sup"}] - Maps text styles to specific HTML tags. @property {string} [allUsedStyles] - Specifies additional styles to the list of allowed styles. Delimiter: "|" (e.g. "color|background-color"). @property {Object<string, string>} [tagStyles={}] - Specifies allowed styles for HTML tags. @property {string} [spanStyles=CONSTANTS.SPAN_STYLES] - Specifies allowed styles for the "span" tag. - The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.SPAN_STYLES}
scopeSelectionTags: Tags treated as whole units when selecting all content. - The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.SCOPE_SELECTION_TAGS}
elementWhitelist: Specifies HTML elements to additionally allow beyond the 'default' allow list. Delimiter: "|" (e.g. "p|div", "*"). - The value entered here will be added to the end of the default list determined by the {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__defaultElementWhitelist} logic above.
elementBlacklist: Filters by specifying HTML elements that should not be used. Delimiter: "|" (e.g. "script|style"). - Tags specified here will eventually be removed, even if they are included in other whitelists.
allowedEmptyTags: A list of tags that are allowed to be kept even if their values are empty. - The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.ALLOWED_EMPTY_NODE_LIST} - It is concatenated with the value of "ALLOWED_EMPTY_NODE_LIST" to form the final 'allowedEmptyTags' list.
allowedClassName: Allowed class names. - Added the default value {@link DEFAULTS.CLASS_NAME}
attributeWhitelist: Specifies additional attributes to allow for each tag. (e.g. {a: "href|target", img: "src|alt", "*": "id"}). - Rules for objects specified here will be merged into the {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__defaultAttributeWhitelist}.
attributeBlacklist: Filter by specifying attributes to disallow by tag. (e.g. {a: "href|target", img: "src|alt", "*": "name"}). - Attributes specified here will eventually be removed even if they are allowed by other settings. - A list of required elements, {@link DEFAULTS.REQUIRED_FORMAT_LINE}, is always included.
textStyleTags: Additional text style tags. - The default follows {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__textStyleTags}
convertTextTags: Maps text styles to specific HTML tags.
allUsedStyles: Specifies additional styles to the list of allowed styles. Delimiter: "|" (e.g. "color|background-color").
tagStyles: Specifies allowed styles for HTML tags.
spanStyles: Specifies allowed styles for the "span" tag. - The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.SPAN_STYLES}
lineStyles: Specifies allowed styles for the "line" element (p..). - The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.LINE_STYLES}
fontSizeUnits: Allowed font size units. - The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.SIZE_UNITS}
retainStyleMode: This option determines how inline elements (such as <span>, <strong>, etc.) are handled when deleting text. - "repeat": Inline styles are retained unless the backspace key is repeatedly pressed. If the user continuously presses backspace, the styles will eventually be removed. - "none": Inline styles are not retained at all. When deleting text, the associated inline elements are immediately removed along with it. - "always": Inline styles persist indefinitely unless explicitly removed. Even if all text inside an inline element is deleted, the element itself remains until manually removed.
defaultLine: Default line element when inserting new lines.
defaultLineBreakFormat:
Specifies the default line break format. - [Recommended] "line" : is a line break that is divided into general tags. - [Not recommended] "br" : Line breaks are treated as
on the same line. (like shift+enter) - Line breaks are handled as
within "line". - You can create a new "line" by entering a line break twice in a row. - Formats that include "line", such as "Quote", still operate on a "line" basis. - ● suneditor processes work in "line" units. - ● When set to "br", performance may decrease when editing a lot of data.
lineAttrReset: Line properties that should be reset when changing lines (e.g. "id|name").
formatLine: Additionally allowed "line" elements beyond the default. Delimiter: "|" (e.g. "p|div").
formatBrLine: Additionally allowed "brLine" elements beyond the default. (e.g. "PRE"). - It is concatenated with the value of {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__defaultFormatBrLine} to form the final 'brLine' element list. - "brLine" elements is included in the "line" element. - "brLine" elements's line break is "BR" tag.
formatClosureBrLine: Additionally allowed "closureBrLine" elements beyond the default. - It is concatenated with the value of {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__defaultFormatClosureBrLine} to form the final 'closureBrLine' element list. - "closureBrLine" elements is included in the "brLine". - "closureBrLine" elements's line break is "BR" tag. - ※ You cannot exit this format with the Enter key or Backspace key. - ※ Use it only in special cases. ([ex] format of table cells)
formatBlock: Additionally allowed "block" elements beyond the default. - It is concatenated with the value of {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__defaultFormatBlock} to form the final 'block' element list. - "block" is wrap the "line" and "component"
formatClosureBlock: Additionally allowed "closureBlock" elements beyond the default. - It is concatenated with the value of {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__defaultFormatClosureBlock} to form the final 'closureBlock' element list. - "closureBlock" elements is included in the "block". - "closureBlock" element is wrap the "line" and "component" - ※ You cannot exit this format with the Enter key or Backspace key. - ※ Use it only in special cases. (e.g. format of table cells)
toolbar_sticky: Enables sticky toolbar with optional offset.
statusbar_container: Container element for the status bar.
copyFormatKeepOn: Keeps the format of the copied content.
autoLinkify: Automatically converts URLs into hyperlinks. ("Link" plugin required) - Default value is determined dynamically based on whether the 'link' plugin is enabled. (default : Boolean(plugins.link))
historyStackDelayTime: Delay time for history stack updates (ms).
fullScreenOffset: Offset applied when entering fullscreen mode.
componentInsertBehavior: Enables automatic selection of inserted components. - For inline components: places the cursor near the inserted component or selects it if no nearby range is available. - For block components: executes behavior based on `selectMode`: - `auto`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, otherwise select the component. - `select`: Always select the inserted component. - `line`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, or create a new line and move there. - `none`: Do nothing.
externalLibs: External libraries like CodeMirror or MathJax. See {@link https://github.com/ARA-developer/suneditor/blob/develop/guide/external-libraries.md External Libraries Guide}
allowedExtraTags: Specifies extra allowed or disallowed tags. - The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.EXTRA_TAG_MAP}
buttons: List of currently used toolbar buttons
buttons_sub: List of currently used sub-toolbar buttons
reverseCommands: Merged reverse command pairs array (includes default 'indent-outdent' + user's reverseButtons).
exportPDF_apiUrl: Server request URL for PDF generation
exportPDF_fileName: Name of the generated PDF file
fileUpload_uploadUrl: Server request URL for file upload
fileUpload_uploadSizeLimit: Total upload size limit in bytes
fileUpload_uploadSingleSizeLimit: Single file size limit in bytes
fileUpload_as: Specify the default form of the file component as 'box' or 'link'
fileUpload_controls: Additional controls to be added to the figure
fileUpload_insertBehavior: Component insertion behavior for selection and cursor placement. [default: options.get('componentInsertBehavior')]
table_colorList: Color list, used in cell color picker
mention_triggerText: The character that triggers the mention list
mention_limitSize: The number of items to display in the mention list
mention_searchStartLength: The number of characters to start searching for the mention list
mention_delayTime: The time to wait before displaying the mention list
mention_apiUrl: The URL to call the mention list
mention_apiHeaders: The headers to send with the API call
mention_useCachingData: Whether to cache the mention list data
mention_useCachingFieldData: Whether to cache the mention list data in the field
fontSize_sizeUnit: The unit for the font size.
fontSize_showDefaultSizeLabel: Determines whether the default size label is displayed in the dropdown menu.
fontSize_showIncDecControls: When true, displays increase and decrease buttons for font size adjustments.
fontSize_disableInput: When true, disables the direct font size input box.
fontSize_unitMap: Optional object to override or extend the default unit mapping for font sizes.
audio_defaultWidth: The default width of the audio tag (e.g., "300px").
audio_defaultHeight: The default height of the audio tag (e.g., "150px").
audio_createFileInput: Whether to create a file input element.
audio_createUrlInput: Whether to create a URL input element (default is true if file input is not created).
audio_uploadUrl: The URL to which files will be uploaded.
audio_uploadHeaders: Headers to include in the file upload request.
audio_uploadSizeLimit: The total upload size limit in bytes.
audio_uploadSingleSizeLimit: The single file size limit in bytes.
audio_allowMultiple: Whether to allow multiple file uploads.
audio_audioTagAttributes: Additional attributes to set on the audio tag.
audio_insertBehavior: Component insertion behavior for selection and cursor placement. [default: options.get('componentInsertBehavior')]
drawing_outputFormat: The output format of the drawing. Options: "dataurl", "svg".
drawing_useFormatType: Whether to enable format type selection (block vs inline).
drawing_defaultFormatType: The default format type, either "block" or "inline".
drawing_keepFormatType: Whether to maintain the chosen format type after drawing.
drawing_lineWidth: The width of the drawing line.
drawing_lineReconnect: Whether to reconnect lines when drawing.
drawing_lineCap: The style of the line cap ("butt", "round", or "square").
drawing_lineColor: The color of the drawing line.
drawing_canResize: Whether the modal form can be resized.
drawing_maintainRatio: Whether to maintain the aspect ratio when resizing.
drawing_formSize: The size configuration for the drawing modal form.
embed_canResize: Whether the embed element can be resized.
embed_showHeightInput: Whether to display the height input field.
embed_defaultWidth: The default width of the embed element (numeric value or with unit).
embed_defaultHeight: The default height of the embed element (numeric value or with unit).
embed_percentageOnlySize: Whether to allow only percentage-based sizing.
embed_uploadHeaders: Headers to include in file upload requests.
embed_uploadSizeLimit: The total file upload size limit in bytes.
embed_uploadSingleSizeLimit: The single file upload size limit in bytes.
embed_iframeTagAttributes: Additional attributes to set on the iframe tag.
embed_embedQuery: Custom query objects for additional embedding services.
embed_insertBehavior: Component insertion behavior for selection and cursor placement. [default: options.get('componentInsertBehavior')]
image_canResize: Whether the image element can be resized.
image_showHeightInput: Whether to display the height input field.
image_defaultWidth: The default width of the image. If a number is provided, "px" will be appended.
image_defaultHeight: The default height of the image. If a number is provided, "px" will be appended.
image_percentageOnlySize: Whether to allow only percentage-based sizing.
image_createFileInput: Whether to create a file input element for image uploads.
image_createUrlInput: Whether to create a URL input element for image insertion.
image_uploadUrl: The URL endpoint for image file uploads.
image_uploadHeaders: Additional headers to include in the file upload request.
image_uploadSizeLimit: The total upload size limit in bytes.
image_uploadSingleSizeLimit: The single file upload size limit in bytes.
image_allowMultiple: Whether multiple image uploads are allowed.
image_acceptedFormats: The accepted file formats for image uploads.
image_useFormatType: Whether to enable format type selection (block or inline).
image_defaultFormatType: The default image format type ("block" or "inline").
image_keepFormatType: Whether to retain the chosen format type after image insertion.
image_linkEnableFileUpload: Whether to enable file uploads for linked images.
image_insertBehavior: Component insertion behavior for selection and cursor placement. [default: options.get('componentInsertBehavior')]
math_canResize: Whether the math modal can be resized.
math_autoHeight: Whether to automatically adjust the height of the modal.
math_fontSizeList: A list of font size options for rendering math expressions.
math_onPaste: A callback function to handle paste events in the math input area.
math_formSize: An object specifying the dimensions for the math modal.
video_canResize: Whether the video element can be resized.
video_showHeightInput: Whether to display the height input field.
video_defaultWidth: The default width of the video element. If a number is provided, "px" will be appended.
video_defaultHeight: The default height of the video element. If a number is provided, "px" will be appended.
video_percentageOnlySize: Whether to allow only percentage-based sizing.
video_createFileInput: Whether to create a file input element for video uploads.
video_createUrlInput: Whether to create a URL input element for video embedding.
video_uploadUrl: The URL endpoint for video file uploads.
video_uploadHeaders: Additional headers to include in the video upload request.
video_uploadSizeLimit: The total upload size limit for videos in bytes.
video_uploadSingleSizeLimit: The single file upload size limit for videos in bytes.
video_allowMultiple: Whether multiple video uploads are allowed.
video_acceptedFormats: Accepted file formats for video uploads.
video_defaultRatio: The default aspect ratio for the video (e.g., 16:9 is 0.5625).
video_showRatioOption: Whether to display the ratio option in the modal.
video_ratioOptions: Custom ratio options for video resizing.
video_videoTagAttributes: Additional attributes to set on the video tag.
video_iframeTagAttributes: Additional attributes to set on the iframe tag.
video_query_youtube: Additional query parameters for YouTube embedding.
video_query_vimeo: Additional query parameters for Vimeo embedding.
video_embedQuery: Custom query objects for additional embedding services.
video_urlPatterns: Additional URL patterns for video embedding.
video_extensions: Additional file extensions to be recognized for video uploads.
video_insertBehavior: Component insertion behavior for selection and cursor placement. [default: options.get('componentInsertBehavior')]
